title: boechera perennans subsp. porphyrea
intro: Boechera perennans subsp. porphyrea, also known as the Purple Rockcress, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Boechera perennans subsp. porphyrea include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits and support overall health and well-being.
